prompt_text:
### Demographics: 74-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 15 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction
Cirrhosis
Body mass index category: Overweight
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Major Depressive Disorder
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Community-acquired pneumonia (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 1 (90+); HF (No); ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; MASLD: Cirrhosis; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (paternal grandfather)
- Social history: Never smoker; No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Duloxetine (60 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 80.8 kg; Height 180.4 cm; BMI 24.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 112/77 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.9%; 9 months ago 8.7%; 6 months ago 8.6%; 3 months ago 8.8%; current 8.2%), FPG (12 months ago 193mg/dL; 9 months ago 210mg/dL; 6 months ago 217mg/dL; 3 months ago 185mg/dL; current 204mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 83.9kg; 9 months ago 80.9kg; 6 months ago 78.8kg; 3 months ago 78.7kg; current 80.8kg), Height (12 months ago 180.4cm; 9 months ago 180.4cm; 6 months ago 180.4cm; 3 months ago 180.4cm; current 180.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 24.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 112mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 76mmHg; 9 months ago 77mmHg; 6 months ago 77mmHg; 3 months ago 76mmHg; current 77mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 46U/L; 9 months ago 44U/L; 6 months ago 42U/L; 3 months ago 39U/L; current 48U/L), AST (12 months ago 57U/L; 9 months ago 62U/L; 6 months ago 60U/L; 3 months ago 51U/L; current 61U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 2.2mg/dL; 9 months ago 2.2mg/dL; 6 months ago 2.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 2.1mg/dL; current 2.0mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 97mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 94mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 97mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 94mL/min/1.73m²; current 95mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 38mg/g; 9 months ago 49mg/g; 6 months ago 38mg/g; 3 months ago 38mg/g; current 43mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 78mg/dL; 9 months ago 82mg/dL; 6 months ago 82mg/dL; 3 months ago 75mg/dL; current 79mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 38mg/dL; 9 months ago 35mg/dL; 6 months ago 35mg/dL; 3 months ago 36mg/dL; current 37mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 130mg/dL; 9 months ago 132mg/dL; 6 months ago 128mg/dL; 3 months ago 146mg/dL; current 138mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 13.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.2g/dL; current 12.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
